data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that an email copy is auto-sent to the signatory after signature capture. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality exists or is implemented in the system. The linked use case mentions the need for an email receipt to be sent to the customer, but without concrete API reads or persisted state checks demonstrating this capability, the requirement is not satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of email copy being auto-sent to the signatory.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the email sending functionality.
